_comment: DO NOT EDIT: generated by scripts/build-egg.mjs
name: Nextcloud Production (MariaDB + Redis + Talk + Whiteboard)
author: info@auroa.online
description: Production-oriented, single-port Nextcloud for Pterodactyl. Its immutable custom image includes Nginx, PHP-FPM, MariaDB, Redis, Node.js and the Whiteboard backend; persistent state stays in the server volume. Also includes Talk, cron, compact activity/audit logs, console administration and updates, and secure proxy defaults. Recommended: 4 GB RAM; minimum without Whiteboard: 2 GB.

installation.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail

readonly IMAGE_INSTALLER=/opt/nextcloud-egg/install.sh

if [[ ! -x "$IMAGE_INSTALLER" ]]; then
	printf '[Installer] ERROR: supported Nextcloud image is missing %s\n' "$IMAGE_INSTALLER" >&2
	exit 1
fi

exec "$IMAGE_INSTALLER"

variables.name: PHP Version
variables.description: Must match the selected Docker image.

variables.name: Nextcloud Version
variables.description: Use latest for a fresh stable release or pin x.y.z. Existing installations retain their installed version during repair.

variables.name: Primary Nextcloud URL
variables.description: Canonical public root URL used for generated links, background jobs, HTTPS detection, and Whiteboard; for example https://cloud.example.com.

variables.name: Additional Trusted Domains
variables.description: Optional comma-separated aliases accepted by Nextcloud, without protocol or path; for example files.example.com,cloud.internal.example.com:8443.

variables.name: Admin User
variables.description: Initial administrator username for a fresh installation.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Initial administrator password. Leave empty to generate one and print/store it on first startup.

variables.name: Trusted Proxies
variables.description: Comma-separated proxy IPs or CIDR ranges. Narrow this list when your proxy address is known.

variables.name: Phone Region
variables.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 default region for local phone numbers.

variables.name: Maintenance Window (UTC)
variables.description: UTC hour when intensive daily background jobs may start.

variables.name: Repair Existing Core
variables.description: Restore official files for the installed Nextcloud version during reinstall; config and data remain untouched.

variables.name: Migrate SQLite
variables.description: Back up and convert an existing SQLite database to embedded MariaDB on first startup.

variables.name: Nextcloud Talk
variables.description: Automatically install and enable Nextcloud Talk for chat and basic WebRTC calls.

variables.name: Whiteboard Backend
variables.description: Install and run the local real-time collaboration backend.

variables.name: External Whiteboard URL
variables.description: Optional external collaboration backend URL. When set, the bundled backend is not started.

variables.name: Whiteboard JWT Secret
variables.description: Optional shared secret for an external backend. Leave empty for a generated local secret.

variables.name: SMTP Host
variables.description: Optional SMTP server. Leave empty to start Nextcloud without configuring email.

variables.name: SMTP Port
variables.description: Optional SMTP port; defaults to 587 when SMTP Host is set.

variables.name: SMTP Security
variables.description: Optional SMTP transport: tls (default), ssl, or none.

variables.name: SMTP Authentication
variables.description: Optional SMTP authentication mechanism; defaults to LOGIN.

variables.name: SMTP User
variables.description: SMTP username.

variables.name: SMTP Password
variables.description: SMTP password or app password.

variables.name: Mail From Address
variables.description: Optional local part before @; defaults to nextcloud.

variables.name: Mail Domain
variables.description: Optional domain after @; defaults to localhost.

variables.name: Upload Limit
variables.description: Nginx and PHP upload/post limit.

variables.name: PHP Memory Limit
variables.description: Per-process PHP memory limit; Nextcloud recommends at least 512M.

variables.name: PHP Max Execution Time
variables.description: Maximum PHP request duration in seconds.

variables.name: PHP Max Input Time
variables.description: Maximum PHP input parsing duration in seconds.

variables.name: PHP-FPM Workers
variables.description: Maximum concurrent PHP-FPM workers. Budget roughly one PHP memory limit per busy worker.

variables.name: MariaDB Buffer Pool
variables.description: Memory reserved for the embedded MariaDB InnoDB buffer pool.

variables.name: Redis Maximum Memory
variables.description: Memory cap for cache and locking data.

variables.name: Nextcloud Log Level
variables.description: 0=debug, 1=info, 2=warning, 3=error, 4=fatal.

variables.name: Console Activity Logs
variables.description: Compact live Nginx/Nextcloud/audit events in the Pterodactyl console. Login events include IP, referrer, username, and configured user email.
